name: Marble Cheesecake Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until light and fluffy.
2. Add 3/4 cup sugar and beat again.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Mix in sour cream and vanilla extract.
5. Stir in melted chocolate (melted with remaining sugar).
6. Pour half of the cheesecake mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Drop spoonfuls of the chocolate mixture on top and swirl with a knife.
8. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes.
9. Reduce temperature to 250°F and bake for an additional hour.
10. Run a knife around the edge of the cake.
11. Cool completely before serving.
12. Top as desired. Variation: Use semi-sweet chocolate chips and add the entire cup of sugar in one step.
